---
title: "Telemetry"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Visibility & Telemetry Control Plane

Modernization requires more than just connectivity; it requires a continuous feedback loop between infrastructure, security, and operations.

## Closed-Loop Integration
This visualization shows how real-time signals inform policy and security decisions.

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZLHTYzim47pthrXSAEt3qPQsqAToyXSOBi7We--AlV69o5eZoPUcfV-zyiTTdCI9pu-pevdPMV2ziLpRjfQUsGdLSCrhsF1YLsbgLHcI90tlalwRC4hSybRQX9HTyng1QS6d2anhse-FlmHVsVTmCWn8bwYlJJKMbgjAucrQupBoQe6ao2umM675ix27swoGweOKAll6w5ql2y5lKLv2tUHq3TyY77iylsRy8_cSn3DTNX23vDl9sL_RMfGyDhP8ZRZb6sxUaBDyOSvSmHkN0FyH9TPezS65K5QJX4noXV3Xbp1Y8wJB_z67lzvhGU3dZMpL3Zu1-zDgX1KfOKdxm0taKrwgjhIHz1lYWip1MAnxJXfu_ux-QUdMTYQ3xPdJOC0YvnKAKn2aUJneH5EDDTezwHsy1rQM6eqHgfhLIpEsWhoW1iqWaqsdWqNeQfCkBOGk68vhTNPJdGZkxe2rzWdYPqSRrNhKdyBU3EQ0dsT5PHtf0Tsn-lkEsVgN4zIxX2wryjumaRI71wgCQovVhx9nY_xvnSoxDfXHxuYFJngv1IPHZvlti7-AUtDWh-YETowPeTwIhhag479HAIwdmdDJx_feY7rYaWOTErhdm1pbO4Kndgp7_TE1DukEPToZAjt__py0)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

### Telemetry Sources
The agency utilizes the following telemetry anchors to maintain the "Modernization Atlas" accuracy:
- **Splunk:** Primary SIEM for security events and performance analytics.
- **Azure Monitor:** Cloud-native metrics for Azure AD and hybrid workloads.
- **Infoblox Ecosystem:** DNS analytics and IPAM change tracking.

All telemetry keys are normalized in `generate.py` to ensure consistent data ingestion.
